steps.t: Skarding can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Skarding.
The hill Skarding speaks of can be found near Thokvist in Misthallow. You should scout the situation at Lumrog from atop a nearby hill.
There must be another nearby hill in Misthallow. You should find another nearby hill.
Wood can be found in Misthallow. You should gather wood from Misthallow.
The second hill you found is in Misthallow. You should build a fire on the hill.
The second hill you found is in Misthallow. You should light the fire on the hill.
Egraedir can be found in Misthallow. You should talk to Egraedir about the fire.
The hill with a good view of Lumrog can be found in Misthallow. You should scout Lumrog from afar.
Skarding can be found at Thokvist. You should report back to Skarding.
